title: Kenyan Dumpling Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew from Kenya, featuring tender dumplings and a rich flavorful broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent.
Add the Kenyan seed; cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant.
Add the tender and velvety; cook, stirring occasionally, until the tender is browned.
Add the tomato paste; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Add the dumplings; cook, covered, for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
